Chinese: 氣象局已發出特別天氣信息
Portuguese: Foi emitido um aviso meteorológico especial.
English: The special weather advisory has been issued.

Chinese: 由於持續受低壓槽影響，預料本澳今晚至週日初時 (26至28日)仍有驟雨及雷暴，雨勢有時頗大，週日稍後雨勢逐漸緩和；請市民留意天氣變化，並關注本局發出的提示及警告。(於 2026年06月26日17時40分 更新)
Portuguese: Due to the continuous influence of a trough of low pressure, showers and thunderstorms are expected from tonight to early hours on Sunday (26th to 28th June), which could be heavy at times. The rainfall is expected to gradually ease on later Sunday. The public is advised to pay attention to weather changes and follow the alerts and warnings issued by SMG.( Data de actualização: 2026-06-26 17H40 )
English: Due to the continuous influence of a trough of low pressure, showers and thunderstorms are expected from tonight to early hours on Sunday (26th to 28th June), which could be heavy at times. The rainfall is expected to gradually ease on later Sunday. The public is advised to pay attention to weather changes and follow the alerts and warnings issued by SMG.( Update Time: 2026-06-26 17H40 )
